title: ARU Games
description:
A vanilla friendly modpack for the ARU Games server.

This pack provides an increase to performance over the vanilla client, with other subtle QOL additions such as reworked sounds, voicechat and texture changes to add to the vanilla experience.
body:
A vanilla friendly modpack for the ARU Games server.

This pack provides an increase to performance over the vanilla client, with other subtle QOL additions such as reworked sounds, voicechat and texture changes to add to the vanilla experience.

This pack is not limited to the ARU Games server and can instead be played on any vanilla Minecraft Server with no issues. 

### **FAQ**

Q: **Can we modify this pack and still play on the ARU Games server?**

A: Yes! Feel free to add additional mods or resource packs how you see fit.

Q: **Where to ask for help / bug report?**

A: For questions you can contact via discord.
